bird.name: 白颈长尾雉
bird.summary: 白颈长尾雉（学名：Syrmaticus ellioti）又名横纹背鸡，是大型雉科長尾雉屬鳥類，為中國特有種，主要分布於長江中下游平原的200-1900米低海拔至中海拔山區一帶。 生态环境 本种常活动于中山地带，在崎岖的山谷及山地的树林中活动，善走善飞，能在茂密的灌木间迅速逃逸，…

relations.subject: 白颈长尾雉
relations.evidence: Elliot's pheasant is endemic to south-eastern China (Guizhou, Hubei, Anhui, Zhejiang, Fujian, Jiangxi, Hunan, Guangxi and Guangdong provinces), where it lives in evergreen and mountain forests at altitudes of . Its diet consists mainly of seeds, leaves and berries
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 白颈长尾雉
relations.evidence: Although there is ongoing habitat loss, and the population is decreasing, partly due to human subsistence hunting, Elliot's pheasant is evaluated as Least Concern on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species, due to its large range and relatively gradual rate of decline. It is listed on Appendix I of CITES
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 白颈长尾雉
relations.evidence: Although there is ongoing habitat loss, and the population is decreasing, partly due to human subsistence hunting, Elliot's pheasant is evaluated as Least Concern on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species, due to its large range and relatively gradual rate of decline. It is listed on Appendix I of CITES
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
